title: share-inv
description: A Fabric mod to share inventory between players
body:
## Share Inventory

A Minecraft Fabric mod that allows players to share inventories with each other in real-time.

### Installation
1. Download the jar file below
2. Place it in your server's `mods` folder
3. Restart your server

### Requirements
- Minecraft 1.21
- Fabric Loader 0.16.14+
- Fabric API

### Usage
Use `/joinSharedInventory <inventoryName>` to join or create a shared inventory group.
